caption: A woman wearing large black over-ear headphones and a brown-and-white striped shirt is seen in a close-up shot against a plain white wall. To her left, a light-colored curtain hangs, partially revealing a blue curtain behind it. The text "Nancy Ramya" is visible in the bottom left corner of each shot. Throughout the sequence, the woman remains centered in the frame, facing forward. In the first frame, she is speaking with her mouth open. In the second frame, her mouth is closed and her expression is neutral. By the third frame, she continues to look forward with a closed mouth. In the final frame, she is speaking again, with her mouth slightly open. A light-colored piece of furniture is partially visible in the background to her right.
